title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the ICICI Bank International Enterprises family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!
